features.name: Multiple tool calls in one turn
Realtime protocol, runtime, and provider adapters
Workflow profiles and layered runtime configuration
Prompt planning, composition, parity checks, and cache sections
Workspace provider registry and managed runtime facade
Injected and opaque cloud workspace refs
Workspace command timeout, cancellation, and output limits
Concurrent JSONL append ordering and corruption detection
Injected SQLite event, run, session, and cache contracts
HTTP JSON-RPC and SSE response mapping
Managed realtime local tool execution and approvals
Deterministic real ZIP package encoding and decoding
Archive CRC, size, duplicate-name, version, and traversal validation
Automatic worker lease heartbeat and control-plane stop polling
Graceful and forced worker stop semantics

extensions.name: OpenRouter aggregator provider
extensions.rationale: TypeScript-only extension; excluded from the Python parity score.
